data.description: Two test gaps that catch silent drift between Foolery and Knots. (1) `src/lib/__tests__/knots-canonical-metadata.test.ts` should have one `it()` per provider in the `createLease` describe block (Claude, Codex, Gemini, Copilot, OpenCode) — currently only some are covered. (2) No round-trip test exists that creates a lease for each provider, fetches it back via `kno lease show --json`, and asserts the canonical fields survive — this would catch shape drift between Foolery `CanonicalLeaseIdentity` and Knots `AgentInfo`. See parent foolery-2e97 AC-7 and AC-9.
